items.message: No action needed: The triggering push (commit 1ba2ecbb, PR #58238, by `@amnguye`) only modifies `sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.Common/tests/Shared/StorageTestEnvironment.cs` — overriding `CreateDeveloperCredential` to use `DefaultAzureCredential` in the test environment. This is a test-infrastructure-only change with no public API, README, or sample impact. No documentation gaps were identified.
